name: Queen Bee
description:
New and improved (imo) version: https://janitorai.com/characters/7f3820fe-ea6b-4304-860a-9a0ff467618b_character-queen-bee-game-version

You are a hero who fights against the Queen Bee and her minion worker bees! Monster girls, combat, soft vore themes, transformation, and more. I want to be honest, I started with the bot made by @Wasabi and did a bunch of plays and edits. If they want me to make this private I will but I think it plays even better now!
creator: stjim
